name: E-1 severity override: numeric severity 0 resolves to the named effective_severity=off per the ESLint 0/1/2 convention
command: printf 'rules:\n  g-ts-001: 0\n' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; grep -q 'effective_severity=off' err.txt && grep -q 'source_value=0' err.txt && echo coerced 1>&2
